spec_match.rationale: Captures the UA-stylesheet special rule (h1 inside article/section/aside/nav shrinks) and the before/after state.

interactive.rationale: 4 interactive markers — toggle plus live probe of computed font size.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises toggle + browser probe; the page delivers both.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show deeply nested h1 (h1 in article > section > aside), nor the interaction with author CSS that already overrode the UA rule.

references.rationale: Includes the correct chromestatus.com/feature/6192419898654720 link in see-also.

openQuestions.title: Show deeply-nested rendering
openQuestions.detail: What does an h1 do inside article > section > aside? Spec rule applies at every depth — show the cascade.

openQuestions.title: Show interaction with author CSS
openQuestions.detail: Author rules that already targeted h1 inside article (with class selectors) may now win. Visualise the cascade before/after.

summary: The reference demo for the deprecation. Shallow nesting coverage and author-CSS cascade coverage still need work.
